title: ficus carica subsp. rupestris
intro: Ficus carica subsp. rupestris is a subspecies of edible fig tree native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its unique ability to grow on rocky terrain and produce fruit even in harsh conditions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of polyphenols and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ficus carica subsp. rupestris include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried figs, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
